headline: FICO Isn’t Worried About VantageScore. Are Investors?
summary: Fair Isaac executives say FICO’s pricing is on par with VantageScore. But the credit bureau’s stock has taken a hit.

raw.headline: FICO Isn’t Worried About VantageScore. Are Investors?
raw.summary: Fair Isaac executives say FICO’s pricing is on par with VantageScore. But the credit bureau’s stock has taken a hit.

headline: Veralto Q1 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, Increase Y/Y
summary: VLTO tops Q1 estimates with 12.6% y/y EPS growth and 6.8% y/y revenue increase, driven by strong Water Quality performance and solid cash flow generation.

raw.headline: Veralto Q1 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, Increase Y/Y
raw.summary: VLTO tops Q1 estimates with 12.6% y/y EPS growth and 6.8% y/y revenue increase, driven by strong Water Quality performance and solid cash flow generation.

headline: Omnicom's Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Increase Year Over Year
summary: OMC Q1 earnings miss but revenues beat, with strong year-over-year growth and steady margins shaping a mixed quarterly performance.

raw.headline: Omnicom's Q1 Earnings Miss Estimates, Increase Year Over Year
raw.summary: OMC Q1 earnings miss but revenues beat, with strong year-over-year growth and steady margins shaping a mixed quarterly performance.

headline: WM's Earnings Surpass Estimates in Q1, Revenues Rise Y/Y
summary: WM beat Q1 EPS estimates as EBITDA and margins rose on pricing, cost cuts and sustainability gains, despite softer revenues and volume figure.

raw.headline: WM's Earnings Surpass Estimates in Q1, Revenues Rise Y/Y
